emails.subject: Enron Canada isda with Transalta
emails.body: Enron Canada isda with Transalta Hi Tana, The executed ISDA list says that we=01,ve got one b/t Enron Canada and=20 Transalta. Can I get a copy of the docs faxed to me asap?? Thanks a lot, Limor Enron Global Markets 520 Madison Avenue New York, NY 10022 Tel: 212.715.5283 Fax: 212.715.5608 E-Mail: Limor.Nissan@Enron.com
